text.tspan: Same failure mode already diagrammed for the hi/make setup (see
dev/make.d2, layer 1): tmux routes a keystroke to whichever pane
has focus, not to the pane the user means to target. If bun run
start is running in a background pane, Ctrl+C typed in the active
pane never reaches pgid 2114546 at all - the whole tree, including
every already-leaked d2 -w process, just keeps running.
